objects.label: picture frame
objects.long_form_open_description: Right-edge crop of a dark brown wooden wall-mounted picture frame with a narrow-to-medium molded profile and a thin gold inner trim, holding a sailboat print; frame corner is visible and slightly worn, partially cut off by the image edge. Approximate camera distance ~1.0 m.
scene_attributes: framed sailboat painting on left wall
small American flag hanging on wall
double closet doors down the hall
hardwood floor
baseboard molding
entry door visible at right with hardware

objects.label: outlet
objects.long_form_open_description: White plastic dual-socket wall outlet with two vertical rectangular receptacles and a centered mounting screw; faceplate fills most of the crop, shows light surface smudging and minor scuffing, wall-mounted and viewed from close distance (approximately 0.4 m from camera).
